title: sm barnacle data payload
description: Result of filing an upstream tool-friction issue. Two shapes selected by mode: a dry-run preview carries the rendered issue 'body'; a real filing carries the created issue 'url'. Both always carry the title, target repo, labels, and the on-disk body file.

title.description: The issue title, with the [barnacle] prefix applied.

repo.description: Target GitHub repo (owner/name) the issue is filed against.

body_file.description: Path to the rendered Markdown issue body, retained for retry.

body.description: Full rendered issue body. Present only for --dry-run.

url.description: URL of the created GitHub issue. Present only on a real filing.
